sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ أَمْسِ لِشِرَاءِ بَعْضِ الدَّوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Jučer sam otišao u apoteku da kupim neki lijek.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the pharmacy yesterday to buy some medicine.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلْتُ الصَّيْدَلِيَّ عَنْ عِلَاجٍ لِأَلَمِ الرَّأْسِ.
sentences.translation: Pitao sam apotekara za lijek protiv glavobolje.
sentences.translationEn: I asked the pharmacist for a treatment for a headache.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَانِي الدَّوَاءَ وَشَرَحَ لِي كَيْفِيَّةَ اسْتِخْدَامِهِ بِشَكْلٍ صَحِيحٍ.
sentences.translation: Dao mi je lijek i objasnio mi kako da ga pravilno koristim.
sentences.translationEn: He gave me the medicine and explained to me how to use it correctly.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرْتُ بِتَحَسُّنٍ كَبِيرٍ بَعْدَ تَنَاوُلِ الْجُرْعَةِ الْأُولَى.
sentences.translation: Osjetio sam veliko poboljšanje nakon uzimanja prve doze.
sentences.translationEn: I felt a great improvement after taking the first dose.
